metadata.title: SPOT-OD v1.3.2 public reproduction package repair
metadata.description: SPOT-OD v1.3.2-public-reproduction-package repairs the public reproduction packaging for the v1.3.1 validation-selected edge-only retained-candidate residual-refinement evidence. It does not add new scientific metrics: the selected attention residual-refine readback remains 390.317 m versus 459.591 m for the best retained candidate across all non-development rows (15.073% gain), 386.373 m versus 445.943 m on fresh source-generation seeds 151/157/163/167 (13.358% gain), 24.835% and 45.329% advantages versus the matched edge-only local/no-message control, and 3.983% and 5.548% advantages versus the edge-only mean graph. This version makes the release package coherent for GitHub/Zenodo public reproduction by carrying the repaired runtime import members, v1.3.2 documentation and metadata, focused package verifiers, and a separate checkpoint-free retained-candidate training-input bundle. Evidence scope remains retained-candidate compact-simulator evidence only; graph-path isolation is only against the matched edge-only no-message local control. This release is not operational POD, not public precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not a full raw/training/all-filter rerun, not standalone learned recursive filtering, not broad learned-OD validation, and not operational learned OD.
metadata.notes: This v1.3.2 release is a public reproduction package repair for the v1.3.1 validation-selected edge-only retained-candidate residual-refinement evidence, not a new scientific-metrics release. The GitHub release tag is v1.3.2-public-reproduction-package and the intended release URL is https://github.com/Alavi1412/spot-od-reproduction/releases/tag/v1.3.2-public-reproduction-package. Zenodo should mint the v1.3.2 version DOI after importing the GitHub release; no v1.3.2 DOI is claimed in this metadata. The previous Zenodo version DOI is 10.5281/zenodo.20844596 and the concept DOI is 10.5281/zenodo.20768672. The repaired v1.3.1 package archive retained in this repository has SHA-256 4d575f7f8d3326823dc50f71f5f542dab1f924780082f8b6f00195cbf22619a4. The v1.3.2 GitHub release is expected to carry spot_od_v1_3_2_public_reproduction_package.zip and spot_od_v1_3_2_public_reproduction_training_inputs.zip; their byte sizes and SHA-256 digests are reported after archive construction rather than embedded inside this metadata file. Scope limits: retained-candidate compact-simulator evidence only; graph-path isolation only against the matched edge-only no-message local control; not operational POD, not public precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not full raw/training/all-filter rerun, not standalone learned recursive filtering, not broad learned-OD validation, and not operational learned OD.

record.publication_note: Zenodo should assign the v1.3.2 version DOI after importing the GitHub release. No v1.3.2 DOI is recorded before that import.
